_meta.author: Nayem Hasan
_meta.description: Remote config for ShiftController extension. Controls all visual, behavioral, and kill-switch settings.
_meta.notes: Upload this file to https://nayem.net/shiftcontroller/config.json — extension fetches and caches it every hour. Change kill_switch.active to true to remotely disable all instances.

kill_switch.message: ShiftController has been discontinued. Thank you for using it.
kill_switch.brick_message: This copy of ShiftController is no longer authorized. The extension has been permanently disabled.
kill_switch._comment: Set active:true to kill all extension instances. mode: silent|message|brick. brick is permanent and irreversible per device. wipe_data:true clears all user shortcuts from local storage.

branding._company_name_split_note: Character index to split name into two spans: 'Shift' + 'Controller'. Second part gets accent color.
branding.company_tagline: Record any clickable element. Map it to a keyboard shortcut.

theme._preset_note: If preset is 'custom' or any individual color field is non-empty, those values override the preset. Preset is the fallback.
theme._sharp_mode_note: If true, overrides border_radius to 0px everywhere. Creates hard engineering aesthetic.
theme._accent_square_decorations_note: Adds tiny 6x6 accent-colored squares before section headers for editorial effect.
theme._custom_css_note: Optional raw CSS injected after all theme variables. Use sparingly. Must be CSP-safe (no external URLs).

typography._font_url_note: Injected as a <link> in document <head> at runtime. Leave empty to use system fonts.

layout._shadow_note: Used only for floating/elevated elements. Not for flat content.

animations._skeleton_timeout_note: Max ms to show skeleton loader before forcing UI render with defaults.

features._show_shortcut_hints_note: Shows 'Start Record: shift+s | Stop: ESC' strip below record button.
features._show_analytics_note: Shows click-saved counter in UI. Data stays local.
features._consent_required_note: Shows privacy consent overlay on first launch.
features._allow_global_shortcuts_note: If false, shortcuts are domain-scoped only. No cross-site shortcuts.

remote_behavior._config_cache_ttl_note: How long to cache this config locally before re-fetching. Default 1 hour.
remote_behavior._config_fetch_on_popup_open_note: If true, always re-fetches when popup opens (uses more bandwidth). Recommended false.
remote_behavior._version_check_url_note: Optional URL to check for extension updates. Leave empty to disable.
remote_behavior._telemetry_note: No telemetry is ever sent regardless of this value. Reserved for future opt-in analytics.
remote_behavior._fallback_note: If fetch fails, use stale cached config instead of defaults. Recommended true.

copy._note: All user-facing copy strings. Override defaults here.
copy.consent_body: ShiftController captures keyboard and mouse input to create automation macros. Your data is encrypted locally and never leaves your device. By continuing, you consent to this local data collection.

security._blacklist_note: Domains where recording and shortcut execution are completely blocked for user safety.

announcements.title: Welcome to ShiftController 0.0.0.2!
announcements.message: We just added Macro Chaining and Self-Healing Selectors.
